item.title: An AI disruption-proof option idea: This little known packaging company has strong cash flow
item.description: Amcor merged with Berry Global last April, creating a huge consumer and healthcare packaging portfolio and positioning it to realize high operating sy...

item.title: This AI-powered health tech stock is undervalued and poised for big gains, says Mizuho
item.description: The bank initiated the stock with an outperform rating.

item.title: Raymond James turns bullish on Chewy after steep sell-off, cites stronger consumer as upside driver
item.description: Raymond James sees shares of Chewy rising 16% from here.

item.title: This stock has nearly 30% upside as AI data center demand grows, says Goldman
item.description: The bank initiated the company, which produces cables and chips to connect powerful AI computers, at a buy rating.

item.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The major averages managed to post gains on Wednesday as tech shares rose. It was the third straight positive day for the S&P 500.
